summary: Chunking config + chunk transcendental-magic into corpus/western_esoteric
description:
Create chunking/western_esoteric/transcendental-magic.toml (scaffold via scripts/chunk_init.py, then hand-tune per tertium-organum.toml precedent). Single-page HTML: section-split on headings.

Key issue: Volume One (Dogme) and Volume Two (Rituel) BOTH have Introduction + chapters 1-22 with overlapping chapter numbers (some identical titles, e.g. 'The Great Work', 'Necromancy'). Section labels must disambiguate volume — e.g. 'Doctrine Ch. {n}' vs 'Ritual Ch. {n}' keyed off the h2 volume headers. Decide single text_id with volume-aware labels vs two-part split (Heroic Enthusiasts pt1/pt2 precedent) at implement time; if split into two text_ids, add a [[work]] grouping in sources/works.toml (Agrippa precedent) — single text_id needs no works.toml entry (implicit singleton).

Pre-strip: Global Grey site chrome/branding, front matter, and the trailing 'Footnotes' h3 section (decide keep-as-annex vs strip — check clean_bodies/apparatus-leak precedent todo:50438e23 before letting editorial apparatus into chunks). max_tokens per house style (~800).

Done: config committed; python scripts/chunk.py produces corpus/western_esoteric/transcendental-magic*.toml chunks with correct volume-disambiguated citation labels; chunk TOMLs committed; existing corpus untouched.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Two-text_id split chosen (Heroic Enthusiasts/Agrippa precedent): regex-section-split supports one capture group, and volumes share chapter numbers AND titles (12. The Great Work, 13. Necromancy, 14. Transmutations in both) — single-text section labels would be ambiguous in citations. Each source downloads the same GG page; volume isolated via pre_strip. Grouped as one work in works.toml for the dossier stage. Also: extractor duplication bug found and fixed en route (todo:89425b7b).

resolution.note: Two configs (exact-title alternation, 23 markers each verified unique per volume slice). Doctrine 96 chunks/68,504 tok; Ritual 123 chunks/86,032 tok. Boundaries verified: doctrine starts 'Behind the veil', ends before Vol2; ritual starts 'KNOWEST thou', 'THE END ↑ Back to top' stripped; GG footnote apparatus already dropped by _sbe_strip. works.toml + work-grouping.md + test_works.py updated to 53 works/213 texts/170 grouped members. Full suite 306 passed.
